sections.heading: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by
sections.summary: This section states that the Notice is issued under specific sections of the Banking Act 1970, namely sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3), and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1). It establishes the legal basis for the Notice's issuance without imposing new obligations or conditions.

requirements.text: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1) of the Banking Act 1970.

sections.source_quote: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1) of the Banking Act 1970.

sections.heading: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024:
sections.summary: This section cancels six specific MAS Notices with effect from 10 May 2024, including notices related to technology risk management and cyber hygiene. The cancellation removes the legal obligations associated with these notices for financial institutions in Singapore.
sections.dtia_summary: The cancellation of these notices affects data transfer and processing obligations by removing prior requirements for technology risk management and cyber hygiene, which may simplify DTIA processes for financial institutions.

requirements.text: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024: (a) MAS Notice 644 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013; (b) MAS Notice 655 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019; (c) MAS Notice 644A "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013; (d) MAS Notice 655A "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019; (e) MAS Notice 1114 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 1 July 2021; (f) MAS Notice 1118 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 1 July 2021.

sections.source_quote: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024: (a) MAS Notice 644 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013; (b) MAS Notice 655 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019; (c) MAS Notice 644A "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013; (d) MAS Notice 655A "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019; (e) MAS Notice 1114 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 1 July 2021; (f) MAS Notice 1118 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 1 July 2021.
